title: Copper gains amid signs of stronger demand
section_path: Copper gains amid signs of stronger demand
section_path_text: Copper gains amid signs of stronger demand
summary:
Main
A weaker USD helped boost investor appetite in commodities. However, uncertainty over US trade policies kept the gains limited. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-05-30 121612.png | assets/2025-05-30_copper-gains-amid-signs-of-stronger-demand_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_988c2a7d208e.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil fell amid ongoing concerns of rising OPEC supply.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A weaker USD helped boost investor appetite in commodities. However, uncertainty over US trade policies kept the gains limited.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil fell amid ongoing concerns of rising OPEC supply. An Interfax reports cited Kazakhstan as saying that the OPEC+ alliance is set to hike output at a meeting on Saturday.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: According to China's NEA total electricity consumption in 2024 reached 9,852bn KWh, a 7% increase from 2023. It recently announced that it expects peak electricity demand to be about 100GW higher this summer than last year as a result of the high temperatures.
